chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S- 113 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 16-06-2023 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate along with the petitioner. M/s Shahriar I. Awan, Assistant A.G and Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State a/w SIP Munir Ahmed Leghari, SHO, P.S, Phull. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner will be satisfied if the official respondents are directed to act in accordance with the law; it also includes SHO, P.S, Phull. Learned AAG and DPG represent that the official respondents at all time will act in accordance with the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
